vibe: Analytical, data-dense, authoritative, and confident. Avoids all 'generic SaaS' tropes by marrying an editorial print aesthetic with Bloomberg-terminal data density.

typography.font_install_instructions: Import Instrument Serif, Geist, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css or via Next/Font if applicable.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Mode B: 'Control Room' grid. Dense, precise, highly structured. Utilizing 1px sharp borders to separate sections, creating an architectural feel.

cards.style: Flat solid background, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), 1px solid border. NO SHADOWS. Pure brutalist clarity.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-zinc-950
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-zinc-950 border border-zinc-950 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors

inputs.style: Rounded-none border-b border-zinc-300 bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus:border-zinc-950 focus:ring-0 transition-colors font-mono text-sm

tables.style: Dense tabular layout. Font-mono for numbers. 1px bottom borders for rows. Right-aligned numerical columns. Minimal padding (py-2).

gauges_scorecards.style: SVG semi-circle arcs. 1px stroke. High-contrast colors (e.g., solid black stroke for base, thick green/red stroke for value). Large editorial serif for the central score number.

status_chips.style: 1px solid border, transparent background, colored text. Example: border-zinc-300 text-zinc-950 for 'Pending', border-green-600 text-green-700 for 'Verified'.

visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the grid. Wrap sections in border-collapse layouts with 1px border-zinc-200.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (regular or thin weight). Precision and geometry.
visual_enhancers.motion: Minimal. Instant state changes preferred. Tiny micro-interactions on hover (-translate-y-px or border color change) but no bouncy/spring physics.

creator_profiles.description: Creator avatar / profile photo (Female, tech/beauty creator setup)
Creator avatar / profile photo (Selfie ring light setup)

brand_verification_backgrounds.description: Abstract glass facade for Brand Verification loading states or backdrop
Urban architecture for solvency/corporate dashboard headers

brand_logos.description: Minimalist placeholder for brand/sponsor logo inside the Deals table
Second minimalist placeholder for brand/sponsor logo

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic Shadcn border-radius presets. Override them to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm` for a sharp print-inspired look.
Data components (Tables, Score Cards, Risk Gauges) must heavily utilize JetBrains Mono for numbers/metrics. The numbers must feel authoritative.
Use Instrument Serif for primary widget titles and page headers (H1/H2). Ensure tracking is tight.
DO NOT use shadows (shadow-md, shadow-lg). Instead, rely on `border border-zinc-200` to define surface boundaries.
In the Creator Health and Brand Solvency widgets, utilize raw SVG elements for charts and gauges to keep the DOM light. Use solid stroke colors, NO gradients.
Add `data-testid` to all actionable items and key data points (e.g., `data-testid='contract-upload-button'`, `data-testid='risk-score-value'`).
